prompt: Create a vertical 3:4 whimsical semi-realistic digital illustration of a confident young woman football champion walking forward in a studio on a warm beige background. She has long loose brown hair, a calm proud expression, and wears an oversized plain white T-shirt, loose beige trousers, and white sneakers. In her left arm she carries a shiny oversized golden World Cup-style trophy with engraved text reading “World Champion 2026”. The back hem of her white T-shirt stretches far to the right like a triangular cloth cape, and exactly eight tiny chibi football players are desperately clinging to and pulling the fabric in a diagonal stack from upper right to lower right. The eight opponents are: 1) a bearded player in a light blue and white striped Argentina-style kit, 2) an angry player in a red and green Portugal-style kit, 3) a gritting player in a yellow Brazil-style kit, 4) a shouting player in a blue Croatia-style kit, 5) a shouting blond player in a white England-style kit, 6) a tense player in a red Spain-style kit, 7) a small player in a white Germany-style kit, and 8) a blond goalkeeper in an orange Netherlands-style kit. Make the opponents toy-like with oversized heads, expressive angry or panicked faces, small bodies, and dynamic tugging poses, all looking as if they are trying and failing to stop her. Add small hand-drawn doodles around the scene: exactly three red heart outlines, two yellow star doodles, and multiple white motion sweat marks near the chibi players. Use polished 3D-cartoon rendering mixed with fashion editorial realism for the main character, detailed folds in the stretched shirt, soft studio lighting, clean composition, full-body view, high detail, humorous triumphant sports-fantasy mood. No logos, no extra text besides the trophy inscription, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a vertical 3:4 whimsical semi-realistic digital illustration of a confident young woman football champion walking forward in a studio on a warm beige background. She has long loose brown hair, a calm proud expression, and wears an oversized plain white T-shirt, loose beige trousers, and white sneakers. In her left arm she carries a shiny oversized golden World Cup-style trophy with engraved text reading “World Champion 2026”. The back hem of her white T-shirt stretches far to the right like a triangular cloth cape, and exactly eight tiny chibi football players are desperately clinging to and pulling the fabric in a diagonal stack from upper right to lower right. The eight opponents are: 1) a bearded player in a light blue and white striped Argentina-style kit, 2) an angry player in a red and green Portugal-style kit, 3) a gritting player in a yellow Brazil-style kit, 4) a shouting player in a blue Croatia-style kit, 5) a shouting blond player in a white England-style kit, 6) a tense player in a red Spain-style kit, 7) a small player in a white Germany-style kit, and 8) a blond goalkeeper in an orange Netherlands-style kit. Make the opponents toy-like with oversized heads, expressive angry or panicked faces, small bodies, and dynamic tugging poses, all looking as if they are trying and failing to stop her. Add small hand-drawn doodles around the scene: exactly three red heart outlines, two yellow star doodles, and multiple white motion sweat marks near the chibi players. No logos, no extra text besides the trophy inscription, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张 3:4 竖构图的奇幻半写实数字插画，画面主体为 一位自信的年轻女足冠军 在暖米色背景的摄影棚中阔步前行。她留着棕色长卷发，表情从容而自豪，身穿一件超大号纯白 T 恤、宽松米色长裤和白色运动鞋。她的左臂抱着一座闪闪发光的超大号世界杯风格金杯，杯身上刻有“World Champion 2026”字样。她白色 T 恤的后摆像三角形斗篷一样向右侧大幅拉伸，正好有八名 Q 版足球小人正拼命抓着并拉扯着布料，呈对角线堆叠排列。这八名对手分别是：1) 一名穿着蓝白条纹阿根廷风格球衣的蓄须球员，2) 一名穿着红绿葡萄牙风格球衣的愤怒球员，3) 一名穿着黄色巴西风格球衣、咬牙切齿的球员，4) 一名穿着蓝色克罗地亚风格球衣的大喊球员，5) 一名穿着白色英格兰风格球衣、金发大喊的球员，6) 一名穿着红色西班牙风格球衣的紧张球员，7) 一名穿着白色德国风格球衣的小个子球员，以及 8) 一名穿着橙色荷兰风格球衣的金发守门员。将这些对手设计成玩具般的 Q 版造型，拥有大头、夸张的愤怒或惊慌表情、小巧的身体以及动态的拉扯姿势，表现出他们试图阻止她却以失败告终的样子。在场景周围添加一些手绘涂鸦：正好三个红色心形轮廓、两个黄色星星涂鸦，以及在 Q 版球员附近添加多个白色运动汗滴符号。主体人物采用精致的 3D 卡通渲染与时尚杂志写实风格相结合，展现拉伸衬衫的细腻褶皱，配合柔和的摄影棚灯光、简洁的构图、全身视角、高细节度，营造出幽默且充满胜利感的体育奇幻氛围。画面中不包含任何标志，除奖杯铭文外无额外文字，无水印。
